name: consent: a registered cleaner number does NOT receive the POPIA notice (B13/F22)
comment: The cleaner has a WS_Cleaners record but no WS_Guests record, so the naive 'no guest record = new' test would wrongly fire the consent notice. The gate excludes registered cleaners. This cleaner's 'hi' matches no cleaning room, so it falls through to the existing NEW-state greeting (pre-B13 behaviour) — exactly one send, and it is the greeting, not the consent notice.
